name: long_article_distills_within_style_budget
input: An 800-word article about why small businesses fail at AI adoption, containing 10+ separate observations across 4 sections.
expect: Distills to one core message and 3-6 ranked keypoints (SB budget). Labels are 2-5 words each. No keypoint exceeds the selected style budget.

name: labels_trace_to_source
input: A product update post listing three shipped features with exact feature names.
expect: Every in-image label uses the exact feature names from the source. No invented features, numbers, or claims.

name: numbers_copied_exactly
input: An event recap mentioning the date 28/05/2026 and the number 7 key takeaways.
expect: Date and count appear in labels exactly as written in the source: 28/05/2026 and 7.

name: cover_request_keeps_only_title_subtitle
input: A 1200-word essay with a request to create a cover image for it.
expect: Distillation produces title and subtitle only for the image. Keypoints are not placed on the cover.

name: short_input_skips_distillation
input: Create a sketchnote: 'Tools amplify the workflow you already have.'
expect: No distillation step needed. The sentence is used directly as the single insight (SBS).

name: keypoints_printed_with_result
input: Any long article generating an image.
expect: The response lists the keypoints/labels used so the user can verify accuracy.
